about.bio1: Developer passionate about creating modern and functional web experiences. I seek new experiences in technology development, always applying best development practices and delivering high-quality, secure solutions.
about.bio2: My top priority is creating practical solutions for complex repetitive actions, always maintaining code quality and organization.
contact.subtitle: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to get in touch!
personal.name: Douglas Viktor
personal.title: Backend Developer & IT Technician
project.1.title: Snake
project.1.desc: A classic snake game where every multiple of 120 increases the level and speed.
project.2.title: Ploop
project.2.desc: A break-block style game where the user plays against the system. The goal is to not let the ball fall, with speed increasing every 15 seconds.
project.3.title: Guess the Word
project.3.desc: Word guessing game where the user can create their own word list. The system picks a random word, and the user has 5 plus the word's letter count to guess it.
project.4.title: Amanajé Library
project.4.desc: Library management website with user authentication and book loan system with user ratings.
project.5.title: Vaudio
project.5.desc: Desktop app that adds system volume increase/decrease shortcuts, running in the background and responding whenever the user needs.
project.6.title: TiClean
project.6.desc: Desktop application for routine cleaning of temporary and unnecessary system files, improving computer performance. Fully automated after startup.
project.7.title: Sintonia Mental
project.7.desc: Web application for online consultations targeting people with or potential for ADHD, with online appointments, scheduling, and payments.
project.8.title: Cine Reserve API
project.8.desc: API designed to manage the complexities of modern cinema operations with focus on data integrity and concurrency control.
project.9.title: Dj-Reframe
project.9.desc: A CLI tool that transforms Django's default startapp command. Choose your architecture or create your own instead of the generic structure.
project.10.title: Appointment App
project.10.desc: Complete web system for appointment management built with Python/Flask. Allows scheduling, staff management, and full admin control.
project.11.title: DataSwitch
project.11.desc: Data and subtitle converter site built with React, focused on file security with 100% client-side architecture. Supports JSON, CSV, XLSX, SQL and more.
exp.1.title: IT Technician
exp.1.desc: Technical course focused on Web Programming to develop innovative digital solutions, coding and maintaining responsive websites and web applications.
exp.2.title: Bootstrap Framework
exp.2.desc: Course focused on developing responsive and modern interfaces using the Bootstrap framework, covering design concepts, components, and customization.
exp.3.title: Prompt Engineering
exp.3.desc: Quick intermediate-level training designed to enable mastery of generative AI tools, focused on testing and refining text instructions for accurate AI responses.
exp.4.title: OOP with Python
exp.4.desc: Course covering Object-Oriented Programming principles using Python, including classes, objects, inheritance, encapsulation, and polymorphism.
exp.5.title: Backend Technologist
exp.5.desc: Course focused on server-side web application development, covering Python, Node.js, PHP, databases, APIs, and security.
exp.6.title: IT Technician
exp.6.desc: Technical support, system maintenance, network configuration, and hardware/software troubleshooting.
